episodes.name: All Episodes Combined
episodes.overview: It’s first day for Class 11 commerce students at KLPD. BBFs Anirban and Raman have their very first fight as Anirban decides to change his section to be with her all-time crush, topper Stuti. Meanwhile, Stuti is sad as principal announces that this year’s headgirl and headboy will be only from science section.

episodes.name: All Episodes Combined
episodes.overview: When Anirban musters up the courage to confess his feelings to Stuti, she reveals that she is leaving the school, shocking everyone. Anirban and his friends hatch a plan to convince her to stay. Will they succeed in keeping their friend at school?
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/btqp7oukwx5i/school-friends-s02-720p-hevc-web-dl-hindi-aac2-0-x265-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: All Episodes Combined
episodes.overview: Stuti and Anirban's almost-love story faces new hurdles, while Principal Bhola's ban on extracurricular activities stirs up tension. In the midst of canteen laughter, they cross paths with a new girl, Yashika.
